description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post with a rear notch sight. The barrel is standard length and ends with a simple slant muzzle brake. The wood components have a natural brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, reflecting a weapon built for reliability and durability in urban environments.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. The design is utilitarian and durable, with classic iron sights and a slant muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the width of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with subtle differences in the receiver and magazine curvature visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
